reviews.review_description: This app could be so much better. The bbc has so many tv shows that could be made into vr content.
This app demonstrates the future of VR. However, the various programmes keep pausing making them unwatchable. 4 Stars for content... 1 star for technical issues.
Great access to many different topics and stories!
Why can we not watch wimbledon tennis in vr? Thought this was bbci player for vr can you not add it so we can enjoy BBC sports in vr please was looking forward to watching wimbledon in vr :(
This like most APPs in Oculus Go are pure junk.   Very little content.   Very little blurry content.  Blurry being the operative word.
BBC vr keeps closing down while in play...

Purgatory
 car's sadness that is 45 5 with  5

I downloaded the app as I thought it was similar to the BBC I player app. However, it has very limited content which is a real shame considering the possibilies inherent in VR technology. Any new content would be greatly appreciated.
An absolute embarrassment from the BBC.

Installed this for the Doctor Who feature, and I thought it was a fun, free, and lite mini experience (also family friendly) Now that something like this has been added to it's line up of serious real world type documentaries, they have a chance to include new features that will appeal to more users. Really hope they keep going in this direction by giving us other content based on BBC shows. Another reviewer said it could be "potentially amazing"..they are right! Let's hope BBC invest more in the future regarding their VR app. Note: I did not experience any glitches or pausing issues while watching this content. It seems they may have fixed any prior problems other users had with the app in the past.
